title: Automated RNA Extraction for SARS-CoV-2
author: Maria Greco
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfb5jiq6
materials: Move plate to Shaker for 2 min
Move plate to Magnet for 5 min
Move plate to the Shaker for 20 sec
Move plate to the Magnet for 60 sec
Move plate from the magnet to position P8
Move plate to the Shaker for 5 min
Move plate to the magnet for 60 sec
When then program is complete, remove the Eppendorf 96-well skirted plate from the deck, and seal with a Thermo Adhesive PCR plate seal.

steps.title: RNA extraction automated on Biomek FX using IN HOUSE protocol
steps.instruction: RNA extraction automated on Biomek FX using IN HOUSE protocol. This protocol descibes the processing of one 96-well plate (93 samples and 3 controls). [Note: At the Crick we have two platforms with slightly different decks (FX1 and FX2) and this protocol descibes setup on FX2] Open the Biomek software, and select the program “RNA Extraction vFINAL” which is located in the “Covid-19” project:

steps.title: Click on “Instrument Setup” as shown...
steps.instruction: Click on “Instrument Setup” as shown below to view the deck layout: FX2 DECK LAYOUT

steps.title: Place 4 boxes (lid off) of...
steps.instruction: Place 4 boxes (lid off) of 250 μl filter tips (green boxes) as shown above.

steps.title: Place 3 boxes (lid off) of...
steps.instruction: Place 3 boxes (lid off) of 50 μl filter tips (pink boxes) as shown above.

steps.title: Place an Axygen Deep well plate in position P12
steps.instruction: Place an Axygen Deep well plate in position P12.

steps.title: At the bench, prepare Beads ,...
steps.instruction: At the bench, prepare Beads , Binding buffer/bead mix , PE Buffer , TET Buffer , Sample Plate , Elution Plate and Magnetic Plate as follows:

steps.title: Take a 1
steps.instruction: Take a 1.5 ml tube of pre-aliquoted silica beads ( 550 µL ) from the fridge and vortex well. We routinely use Silica Magnetic Beads from G-BioScience (see Materials ) but we have also tested and validated SeraSil Mag 400 beads (GE Healthcare/Cytiva) as a potential substitite.

steps.title: Record beads manufacturer and LOT number
steps.instruction: Record beads manufacturer and LOT number.

steps.title: Place on the single tube magnet...
steps.instruction: Place on the single tube magnet for 00:01:00 or until supernatant is clear.

steps.title: Remove and discard supernatant (into the tip waste bin)
steps.instruction: Remove and discard supernatant (into the tip waste bin).

steps.title: Remove tube from magnet and add 550 µL, TET
steps.instruction: Remove tube from magnet and add 550 µL, TET . Resuspend the beads by vortexing.

steps.title: Pulse spin the tube and place...
steps.instruction: Pulse spin the tube and place on the magnet for 00:01:00 or until supernatant is clear.

steps.title: Remove and discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove and discard supernatant.

steps.title: Repeat bead washing for a total of 3 times
steps.instruction: Repeat bead washing for a total of 3 times.

steps.title: Add 550 µL, TET
steps.instruction: Add 550 µL, TET . Resuspend the beads by vortexing. Pulse spin the tube and place on the magnet for 00:01:00 or until supernatant is clear. Remove and discard supernatant. (2/3)

steps.title: Add 550 µL, TET
steps.instruction: Add 550 µL, TET . Resuspend the beads by vortexing. Pulse spin the tube and place on the magnet for 00:01:00 or until supernatant is clear. Remove and discard supernatant. (3/3)

steps.title: Remove the tube from the magnet,...
steps.instruction: Remove the tube from the magnet, resuspend the beads in 550 µL, TET , vortex and spin down.

steps.title: In the Falcon tube containing the...
steps.instruction: In the Falcon tube containing the 50 mL, binding buffer (labelled BB, pre-aliquoted) add the beads prepared..

steps.title: Mix well by inverting
steps.instruction: Mix well by inverting.

steps.title: Pour into a reservoir and aliquot...
steps.instruction: Pour into a reservoir and aliquot 400 µL immediately in each well of a 96 deep well Nunc plate, using a multichannel pipette. Place on the deck in position P9 .

steps.title: Add PE buffer to a new...
steps.instruction: Add PE buffer to a new reservoir and aliquot 600 µL into a new Nunc plate and place plate in position P8 .

steps.title: Add TET to new reservoir and...
steps.instruction: Add TET to new reservoir and aliquot 06 mL, TET (from batch certified aliquot) into a new Nunc plate and place in position P15 .

steps.title: Place the sample plate (seal removed) in position P10
steps.instruction: Place the sample plate (seal removed) in position P10 . N.B.: If samples have been temporarily stored, briefly spin in the plate centrifuge.

steps.title: Label an empty Eppendorf LoBind 96-well...
steps.instruction: Label an empty Eppendorf LoBind 96-well skirted plate with a pre-printed SPL barcode (e.g. SPL00000) on the front side, and place in position P16 .

steps.title: Place the Alpaqua Magnum FLX magnetic plate in position P13
steps.instruction: Place the Alpaqua Magnum FLX magnetic plate in position P13 .

steps.title: The final set up should look like the photo below
steps.instruction: The final set up should look like the photo below: FX2 DECK LAYOUT

steps.title: Using the laptop beside the FX,...
steps.instruction: Using the laptop beside the FX, push the samples through the Extraction step in ClarityLIMS (refer to ‘COVID-19 LIMS walkthrough’ document on COVID-19 sample handling landing page).

steps.title: Make sure you switch ON the...
steps.instruction: Make sure you switch ON the Inheco (blue box next to the FX monitor).

steps.title: Transfer 150 μl of samples to 400 μl (2
steps.instruction: Transfer 150 μl of samples to 400 μl (2.6x Vol) of Binding Buffer (BB) containing the Silica beads and mixe 10 times by pipetting up and down

steps.title: Move the plate on the Shaker for 5 min
steps.instruction: Move the plate on the Shaker for 5 min

steps.title: Move plate to position P8 and mix 20 times
steps.instruction: Move plate to position P8 and mix 20 times

steps.title: Move plate to P8 and incubate for 3 min
steps.instruction: Move plate to P8 and incubate for 3 min

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant

steps.title: Move plate from magnet to position...
steps.instruction: Move plate from magnet to position P8 Wash with PE (

steps.title: Transfer 180 μl of PE Buffer...
steps.instruction: Transfer 180 μl of PE Buffer in each well of the Bead Mixture plate

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant

steps.title: Move plate from the magnet to...
steps.instruction: Move plate from the magnet to position P8 Wash with PE (

steps.title: Transfer 180 μl of PE Buffer...
steps.instruction: Transfer 180 μl of PE Buffer in each well of the Bead Mixture plate

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant

steps.title: Move plate from the magnet to...
steps.instruction: Move plate from the magnet to position P8 Wash with PE (

steps.title: Transfer 180 μl of PE Buffer...
steps.instruction: Transfer 180 μl of PE Buffer in each well of the Bead Mixture plate

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant

steps.title: Transfer 40 μl of TET Buffer...
steps.instruction: Transfer 40 μl of TET Buffer to the Bead Mixture plate and mix 10 times

steps.title: Transfer 35 μl from the Bead...
steps.instruction: Transfer 35 μl from the Bead Mixture plate to the Eppendorf twin.tec plate

steps.title: Continue with the qPCR RNA Transfer...
steps.instruction: Continue with the qPCR RNA Transfer or place in the -80 °C until it is used for qPCR setup.

steps.title: Archiving of Inactivated viral samples would...
steps.instruction: Archiving of Inactivated viral samples would have already been performed after sample plating . For archiving the stock RNA plates using the app in Clarity LIMS, a database table is updated with the information.

steps.title: This results in an entry appearing...
steps.instruction: This results in an entry appearing on the dashboard to let the team know the samples are ready to be archived:

steps.title: An archiving app then displays the...
steps.instruction: An archiving app then displays the boxes and plates that are waiting to be archived, and gives the team the chance to enter the storage information:

steps.title: Once logged, the record disappears from...
steps.instruction: Once logged, the record disappears from this screen, and the archiving information will appear in the archive search app:
